auto.k_5add91b6: By using VibeCity, you agree to follow these terms. If you do not agree, please stop using the service.
auto.k_7b8823a2: Use VibeCity for lawful purposes only.
auto.k_5d460f6c: Do not attempt to disrupt or reverse engineer the platform.
auto.k_6d9a8252: Respect other users and venue operators.
auto.k_b6e07d23: Venue information may change over time. We do our best to keep listings accurate, but do not guarantee completeness or accuracy.
auto.k_cc68d8c7: We may update, suspend, or discontinue parts of the service at any time. We are not liable for interruptions beyond our control.
auto.k_96fed72c: VibeCity is provided "as is." We are not responsible for losses resulting from reliance on venue information, availability, or third-party services.
auto.k_590d86fa: If you have questions about these terms, contact the VibeCity team.
auto.k_f54da0f6: VibeCity is built to minimize personal data collection. We use anonymous analytics to understand product usage and improve the experience.
auto.k_8be44d7e: Basic device/browser details (user agent, coarse device type).
auto.k_ad0abcf2: Approximate location metadata (country/city) when provided by the platform headers.
auto.k_854fe812: Product events (example: session_start, venue selection) without raw IP storage in product analytics.
auto.k_5a2b3250: may store raw IP addresses to protect the service and support enterprise audit requirements.
auto.k_2c612766: We do not sell your personal data.
auto.k_a26b6737: We do not store raw IP addresses in product analytics.
auto.k_5aeec80e: You can choose whether to allow anonymous analytics. This setting is stored locally on your device.
auto.k_8b9f8acb: Product analytics uses a rolling retention window (raw events are kept short-term and aggregated archives longer-term). Security/audit raw IP logs are retained for
auto.k_266e7ae7: If you have questions, contact the VibeCity team.
auto.k_e810bff8: Refer friends, earn commissions, get paid.
auto.k_bd2e6383: After transfer, send slip screenshot to support for activation.
auto.k_e86cd544: No partner orders in the latest 90 days.
auto.k_66ab3e: Review submissions, audit manual transfers, and present usage analytics.
auto.k_e9333b: ลงชื่อเข้าใช้ด้วยบัญชีแอดมินก่อนใช้งานแดชบอร์ด
auto.k_9991e3ea: No pending shops to review. Good job!
auto.k_b98f0395: Auto-review results + audit metadata for manual transfers
auto.k_cfa8bf92: Search slips by SKU or visitor ID
